scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:shared
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm run test:watch -w backend" "npm run test:watch -w frontend" "npm run test:watch -w shared"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:shared
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:frontend && npm run lint:fix:backend && npm run lint:fix:shared
scripts.lint:fix:backend: cd backend && npm run lint:fix || true
scripts.lint:fix:shared: cd shared && npm run lint || true
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:shared
